title: Our Mutual Friend
author: Charles Dickens
content: “I hope it may not be against me that I am an honest man.”
action: Stand on your principles when systems demand compromise.

title: Germinal
author: Émile Zola
content: “The men were gathering... a black, avenging army, germinating in the furrows.”
action: Acknowledge the latent power of collective frustration.

title: Dead Souls
author: Nikolai Gogol
content: “What a strange and alluring and captivating and devilish charm there is in the road!”
action: Value the process of movement over the arrival.

title: The Grapes of Wrath
author: John Steinbeck
content: “The bank is something more than men, I tell you. It's the monster.”
action: Identify when an institution has outgrown its human purpose.

title: Great Expectations
author: Charles Dickens
content: “Take nothing on its looks; take everything on evidence. There's no better rule.”
action: Demand objective verification before committing resources.
